title: Fix congress page regression after latest changes

log.context: Fix congress page regression after latest changes

Done. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Root cause:** The most recent commit (`157dcd6`) added a `<div id="musicBar">` and `<button id="musicMuteBtn">` after the `</script>` closing tag. The JavaScript inside the script block referenced both elements before `init()` ran:

```js
const musicBar = document.getElementById('musicBar');       // null — not in DOM yet
const musicMuteBtn = document.getElementById('musicMuteBtn'); // null
musicMuteBtn.addEventListener('click', ...); // TypeError: Canno...(truncated)
